---
title: "education_citizenship_eda"
format: pdf
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(ggthemes)

#library(ggstatsplot)

library(ggstatsplot)
library(tigris)


data <- read_parquet("../data/clean_data.parquet")
```

```{r}
glimpse(data[1:27])
```

```{r}
citizen_eda_18 <- data %>% 
  dplyr::select(age, income_personal, cit, education, esr, race_simp) %>% 
  filter(age > 18,
         esr != "Not in Labor Force") %>% 
  mutate(income_brackets = case_when(income_personal <= 15000 ~ "0-15k",
                                     income_personal <= 30000 ~ "15k-30k",
                                     income_personal <= 60000 ~ "30k-60k",
                                     income_personal <= 90000 ~ "60k-90k",
                                     income_personal <= 120000 ~ "90k-120k",
                                     income_personal <= 150000 ~ "120k-150k",
                                     income_personal > 150000 ~ "150k+")) %>% 
  mutate(cit_simp = ifelse(cit != "Not a U.S. citizen",
                                 "Citizen",
                                 "Non-Citizen"),
         cit_simp = factor(cit_simp,
                           levels = c("Non-Citizen",
                                            "Citizen")))

glimpse(citizen_eda_30)
```


```{r}
citizen_eda_18 %>% 
  group_by(income_brackets, cit_simp) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(cit_simp) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  mutate(income_brackets = factor(income_brackets, 
                                levels = c("0-15k", "15k-30k", "30k-60k", 
                                           "60k-90k", "90k-120k", "120k-150k", "150k+"))) %>% 
  ggplot() +
    geom_col(aes(x = income_brackets,
                 y = prop,
                 fill = cit_simp),
             position = "dodge") +
    theme_few() +
    labs(fill = "",
         title = "Citizenship Determines Likelihood of Income",
         caption = "Source: ACS PUMS 2024 for LA County",
         subtitle = "80% chance of making less than 60k for non-citizens vs. 55% for citizens") +
    xlab("") +
    ylab("") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
          plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
          legend.position = c(0.9, 0.86),
          legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("#377eb8", "#4daf4a"))
```

```{r}
citizen_eda_18 %>% 
  group_by(income_brackets, cit_simp) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(cit_simp) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  mutate(income_brackets = factor(income_brackets, 
                                levels = c("0-15k", "15k-30k", "30k-60k", 
                                           "60k-90k", "90k-120k", "120k-150k", "150k+"))) %>% 
  group_by(cit_simp) %>% 
  filter(income_brackets %in% c("0-15k", "15k-30k", "30k-60k")) %>% 
  summarise(prob_less_60k = round(sum(prop), 2))
```

```{r}
rac_cit_plot <- citizen_eda_18 %>% 
  mutate(race_simp = factor(race_simp,
                            levels = c("White", "Hispanic", "Asian", "Black", "Other")),
         education = factor(education,
                            levels = c("Post-bacc professional degree",
                                       "Doctorate degree",
                                       "Master's degree",
                                       "Bachelor's degree",
                                       "Associate's degree",
                                       "Some college",
                                       "Regular high school diploma",
                                       "GED or alternative credential",
                                       "Less than High School",
                                       "No schooling completed"))) %>% 
  mutate(income_brackets = case_when(income_personal <= 15000 ~ "0-15k",
                                     income_personal <= 30000 ~ "15k-30k",
                                     income_personal <= 60000 ~ "30k-60k",
                                     income_personal <= 90000 ~ "60k-90k",
                                     income_personal <= 120000 ~ "90k-120k",
                                     income_personal <= 150000 ~ "120k-150k",
                                     income_personal > 150000 ~ "150k+")) %>% 
  ggplot() +
    geom_bar(aes(y = cit_simp,
                 fill = race_simp),
             position = position_fill(reverse = TRUE)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Asian" = "#e41a1c",
                               "White" = "#377eb8",
                               "Hispanic" = "#4daf4a",
                               "Black" = "#984ea3", 
                               "Other" = "#ff7f00")) +
  theme_few() +
  ylab("") +
  xlab("") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  labs(
    title = "Plot 4: Race Is Disproportionately Spread Across Citizenship Status",
       #caption = "Source: ACS PUMS 2024 for LA County",
       fill = "")

ggsave("../../statistical_report/rac_cit_plot.png",
       rac_cit_plot,
       width = 10, 
       height = 6, 
       dpi = 600)
```

```{r}
rac_cit_plot
```


```{r}
test <- chisq.test(table(citizen_eda_18$race_simp,
                         citizen_eda_18$cit_simp))

test
```

```{r}
ggbarstats(
  data = citizen_eda_18,
  x = race_simp,
  y = cit_simp
) +
  labs(caption = NULL) # remove caption
```
 
```{r}
ggbarstats(
  data = citizen_eda_18,
  y = race_simp,
  x = cit_simp
) +
  labs(caption = NULL) # remove caption
```
 
```{r}
library(vcd)

mosaic(~ race_simp + cit_simp,
  direction = c("v", "h"),
  data = citizen_eda_18,
  shade = TRUE
)
```
 
```{r}
citizen_eda_18 %>% 
  group_by(income_brackets, cit_simp, race_simp) %>%   # add race here
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(cit_simp) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  mutate(income_brackets = factor(income_brackets, 
                                levels = c("0-15k", "15k-30k", "30k-60k", 
                                           "60k-90k", "90k-120k", "120k-150k", "150k+"))) %>% 
  ggplot() +
    geom_col(aes(y = income_brackets,
                 x = prop,
                 fill = race_simp),            # fill is now race
             position = "stack") +        # stack race within each bar
    facet_wrap(~ cit_simp) +             # separate panels for citizen/non-citizen
    theme_few() +
    labs(fill = "",
         title = "Citizenship Determines Likelihood of Income",
         caption = "Source: ACS PUMS 2024 for LA County",
         subtitle = "79% chance of making less than 60k for non-citizens vs. 47% for citizens") +
    xlab("") +
    ylab("") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
          plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
          legend.position = "bottom") +
    scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2")
```

```{r}
puma_income_summary <- data %>%
  select(puma, income_personal, cit) %>%
  mutate(
    cit_simplified = ifelse(
      cit != "Not a U.S. citizen",
      "U.S. Citizen",
      "Not a U.S. Citizen"
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(puma, cit_simplified) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_income = mean(income_personal, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

puma_shapes <- pumas(state = "CA", year = 2020, cb = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(puma = as.character(PUMACE20))

puma_income_summary <- puma_income_summary %>%
  mutate(puma = as.character(puma))

map_income_data <- puma_shapes %>%
  left_join(puma_income_summary, by = "puma")

la_county <- counties(state = "CA", cb = TRUE) %>%
  filter(NAME == "Los Angeles")

la_income_map <- map_income_data %>%
  st_filter(la_county)
```


```{r}
la_citizens <- la_income_map %>%
  filter(cit_simplified == "U.S. Citizen")

ggplot(la_citizens) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = mean_income),
          color = "white",
          size = 0.15) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    name = "Average Income ($)",
    option = "magma",
    direction = -1,
    labels = scales::dollar_format()
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Average Personal Income by PUMA",
    subtitle = "U.S. Citizens — Los Angeles County",
    caption = "Source: ACS PUMS 2024"
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )
```

```{r}
la_non_citizens <- la_income_map %>%
  filter(cit_simplified == "Not a U.S. Citizen")

ggplot(la_non_citizens) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = mean_income),
          color = "white",
          size = 0.15) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    name = "Average Income ($)",
    option = "magma",
    direction = -1,
    labels = scales::dollar_format()
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Average Personal Income by PUMA",
    subtitle = "Non–U.S. Citizens — Los Angeles County",
    caption = "Source: ACS PUMS 2024"
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )
```
